positive: A minimalist, highly stylized celestial fox silhouette among abstract geometric constellations. The fox is seated gracefully, forming a strong, elegant S-curve, surrounded by interlocking geometric shapes of stars and moons. The color palette is limited to deep indigo, metallic gold, and matte cream, emphasizing strong contrast and negative space. The composition is perfectly centered and balanced, designed for apparel printing. Clean lines, vector illustration quality, highly detailed negative space, deep cosmic background, symmetrical and mythical aesthetic, graphic design, clean print art, studio lighting, high contrast, --ar 1:1
